mapper.sql: id, application_id, decision_result, approved_amount, interest_rate, loan_term, reject_reason_code, decision_explanation, policy_references_json, decided_by, decided_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_decision (application_id, decision_result, approved_amount, interest_rate, loan_term, reject_reason_code, decision_explanation, policy_references_json, decided_by, decided_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{decisionResult}, #{approvedAmount}, #{interestRate}, #{loanTerm}, #{rejectReasonCode}, #{decisionExplanation}, #{policyReferencesJson}, #{decidedBy}, #{decidedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM approval_decision WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
